article.headline: Bayern ease past Mainz 3-1 to move third in Bundesliga
article.description: Bayern Munich struck twice in five minutes through Coman and Kane to cruise past Mainz 05 3-1 on Saturday and move into third place in the Bundesliga.
article.linkText: Kane scores in Bayern's 3-1 win over Mainz

images.name: Coman & Kane strike in Bayern's win over Mainz
images.caption: Bayern Munich cruised to a 3-1 win over Mainz to stay in touching distance of the Bundesliga leaders.

video.headline: Coman & Kane strike in Bayern's win over Mainz
video.caption: Bayern Munich cruised to a 3-1 win over Mainz to stay in touching distance of the Bundesliga leaders.
video.title: Coman & Kane strike in Bayern's win over Mainz
video.description: Bayern Munich cruised to a 3-1 win over Mainz to stay in touching distance of the Bundesliga leaders.

tracking.trackingName: SOC_One-Play (Mainz vs. Bayern Munich - Game Highlights) 2023/10/21 ESHEET

article.story:
German champions Bayern Munich struck twice in five minutes through Kingsley Coman and Harry Kane to cruise past Mainz 05 3-1 on Saturday and move into third place in the Bundesliga, two points behind leaders Bayer Leverkusen.

Bayern enjoyed a strong start as they looked to end their three-game losing run against their opponents in Mainz.

- Stream on ESPN+: LaLiga, Bundesliga, more (U.S.)

They took an 11th-inute lead when in-form Leroy Sane won possession in his own half, charged forward to feed France winger Coman, who controlled the ball with one touch and fired home.

Mainz almost got an equaliser two minutes later but Lee Jae-sung's header was tipped onto the post by keeper Sven Ulreich and Bayern doubled their lead when England captain Kane bagged his ninth goal of the season with a close-range header.

The hosts looked to have little to offer in terms of attacking threat but as Bayern took their foot off the gas they got their opportunity in the 43rd minute when Anthony Caci found too much space on the left and rifled home to cut the lead.

Mainz had a golden chance to level through Stefan Bell but his shot, with Ulreich beaten, sailed narrowly wide in the 57th.

Just two minutes later, however, Bayern made it 3-1 thanks to Leon Goretzka's low drive from the edge of the box.

The Bavarians, who travel to Galatasaray in the Champions League on Tuesday, are on 20 points, one behind second-placed VfB Stuttgart, and two adrift of Bayer Leverkusen, 2-1 winners at VfL Wolfsburg. Mainz, still without a win this season, are 17th on two points.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.

Goal!  1. FSV Mainz 05 0, FC Bayern München 1. Kingsley Coman (FC Bayern München) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Leroy Sané   following a fast break.

Goal!  1. FSV Mainz 05 0, FC Bayern München 2. Harry Kane (FC Bayern München) header from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Leon Goretzka with a headed pass   following a set piece situation.
Matthijs de Ligt (FC Bayern München) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  1. FSV Mainz 05 1, FC Bayern München 2. Anthony Caci (1. FSV Mainz 05) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Brajan Gruda.
Ludovic Ajorque (1. FSV Mainz 05) is shown the yellow card.
Dominik Kohr (1. FSV Mainz 05) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal!  1. FSV Mainz 05 1, FC Bayern München 3. Leon Goretzka (FC Bayern München) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Jamal Musiala.
Substitution, 1. FSV Mainz 05. Aymen Barkok replaces Lee Jae-Sung.
Substitution, 1. FSV Mainz 05. Maxim Leitsch replaces Anthony Caci.
Stefan Bell (1. FSV Mainz 05) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, FC Bayern München. Bouna Sarr replaces Leon Goretzka because of an injury.
Substitution, 1. FSV Mainz 05. Tom Krauß replaces Edimilson Fernandes.
Substitution, 1. FSV Mainz 05. Marco Richter replaces Dominik Kohr.
